summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Smart Script Parser V2 feature. Backend APIs (POST /api/scripts, PUT /api/scripts/{id}, GET /api/scripts/{id}) all working correctly. Frontend 3-step wizard UI fully functional: Step 1 (Detected Characters) shows character cards with line counts and confidence bars, Step 2 (Preview & Fix) displays color-coded lines with type badges, Step 3 (Line Assignment) shows ME/READER/ACTION sections. Parser logic correctly detects characters, dialogue, parentheticals, actions, and scene headings.

issues: data-testid='char-select-SARAH' not rendering as HTML attribute - clicks work via tabindex attribute workaround. This is expected RN Web behavior with testID prop.

critical_code_review_comments: Parser logic (smartScriptParser.ts) correctly implements all heuristics: ALL CAPS character detection, parenthetical detection, multi-line dialogue attribution, action block detection, scene heading detection
Script-parser.tsx correctly implements 3-step wizard with state management, reclassification, and back navigation
upload.tsx correctly passes title and rawText params to /script-parser route
Backend PUT /api/scripts/{id} correctly updates user_character field and marks is_user_character on characters array
Save & Start flow works - script is created via API, user_character is updated, Alert shows for navigation (React Native Alert works correctly)
test_credentials: N/A - No authentication required. Device ID generated automatically.
seed_data_creation: Created test scripts via API during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Script Parser V2 feature fully tested. Key routes: /upload (entry point with 'Smart Parse V2' button), /script-parser (3-step wizard). Backend endpoints: POST /api/scripts (creates script with parsed characters), PUT /api/scripts/{id} (updates user_character), GET /api/scripts/{id} (returns script). Parser runs client-side in smartScriptParser.ts. The Alert.alert after save is a React Native native dialog that requires manual interaction in web preview - script saves correctly via API. Touch events work via tabindex attribute in RN Web.

tests_performed.result: PASS - Creates script with parsed characters (SARAH, MIKE detected)
PASS - Returns script with characters, lines, raw_text
PASS - Sets is_user_character on correct character
PASS - Both 'Parse with AI' and 'Smart Parse V2' buttons visible
PASS - Navigates to /script-parser with title and rawText params
PASS - Shows 2 characters (SARAH, MIKE) with line counts and confidence bars
PASS - ME badge appears, Preview button enables
PASS - Color-coded lines with CHARACTER, DIALOGUE, PARENTHETICAL badges
PASS - ME, READER, ACTION/STAGE sections with correct counts
PASS - API calls succeed (POST scripts + PUT user_character)
PASS - Step 3 → Step 2 → Step 1 navigation works
PASS - All 3 dialogue lines attributed correctly
PASS - Narrative text detected as ACTION
